Chat.title: Need help?
Chat.subtitle: We're here for you.
Chat.welcome: Ask about treatments, products, booking, or clinic details. I answer from approved Mone Beauty Clinic content only.
Chat.error: Chat is temporarily unavailable. Please try again or contact the clinic directly.
Chat.consent: I agree that this chat can be stored so Mone Beauty Clinic can respond and improve service.
Chat.handoff: Ask a human to follow up
Chat.handoffSent: Your request has been sent to the clinic.
Chat.handoffError: The handoff could not be sent. Please call or email the clinic.

Home.metaTitle: Instrumental cosmetology & beauty care in Helsinki
Home.metaDescription: Mone Beauty Clinic — an aesthetic-medicine clinic in Helsinki: endospheres therapy, laser, RF lifting, trichology, facial & body care, and AROSHA products.

endospheres.title: Endospheres therapy
endospheres.description: An innovative procedure that utilizes a unique device based on radiofrequency and vacuum technology. This treatment helps improve the skin, reduce cellulite, increase skin firmness and tone, and enhance microcirculation.

arosha.title: Arosha Boost
arosha.description: AROSHA has developed intensive products and programs that suit every customer's requirements. Depending on the desired result, a specialist will help you choose the right protocol.

facial.title: Facial treatments
facial.description: At our salon, we use the most effective hardware and cosmetic procedures for the face to highlight your natural beauty and give your skin a healthy, radiant appearance.

Home.aroshaIntro: AROSHA is the European leader in the worldwide number of body products sold in the area. The AROSHA brand is characterized by traditionally high Italian quality, ease of use and solves the most complex problems, with results that are visible after a short period of use.

byAppointment.title: By appointment
byAppointment.desc: Book a time that suits you — Mon–Sun by agreement.

Catalog.metaDescription: AROSHA and DIXIDOX De Luxe professional products at Mone Beauty Clinic, Helsinki.
Catalog.title: Catalog
Catalog.intro: Professional AROSHA body products and DIXIDOX De Luxe trichology line.

Booking.heading: Book an appointment
Booking.intro: Choose a treatment, pick a time, and confirm — it takes under a minute.
Booking.pickDateFirst: Select a date to see available times.
Booking.noTimes: No open times on this day — please pick another date.

fields.name: Full name
fields.consent: I agree to Mone Beauty Clinic storing my details to manage this appointment, in line with the Privacy Policy.

confirmed.title: Your appointment is booked
confirmed.body: We've reserved your time and will be in touch to confirm the details.

errors.slotTaken: Sorry, that time was just taken. Please choose another.
errors.unavailable: Online booking is temporarily unavailable. Please call or email us and we'll arrange your visit.
errors.generic: Please check the form and try again.

Booking.fallback: Prefer to book directly? Reach us and we'll be glad to arrange your visit.

Checkout.heading: Confirm your order
Checkout.intro: Leave your contact details and we will contact you to confirm availability and handover details.

errors.invalid_json: The order could not be read. Please try again.

errors.consent_required: Please accept the privacy consent before submitting.
errors.unavailable: Checkout is temporarily unavailable. Please call or email us.
errors.generic: Please check the form and try again.

Order.heading: Order received
Order.intro: Thank you. We have received your order request and will contact you to confirm the details.

Staff.heading: Schedule
Staff.intro: Manage open slots, closed times, and the day’s appointments. Authentication and role gating are added in the next phase.
